description: GHSL (Genotype-aware Haplotype Structure Landscape) haplotype contrast evidence. Derived from Clair3 phased genotypes, detects within-sample allelic divergence that clusters samples by karyotype independently of PCA. Validates Layer A by an orthogonal route: if PCA says 'these 89 samples are HOM_REF' and GHSL agrees on the same 89 samples, that's independent confirmation.
question: Q7
source_script: C04 GHSL v5 (within-sample haplotype divergence) + STEP_C01c triangle insulation

ghsl_contrast_score.description: Normalized GHSL v5 contrast statistic for the candidate region

triangle_insulation_score.description: STEP_C01c triangle insulation score at the left boundary

ghsl_vs_pca_rand_index.description: Adjusted Rand Index between GHSL sample clusters and PCA sample clusters. High = independent confirmation.

ghsl_concordance_class.description: strong: Rand > 0.7; concordant: > 0.4; weak: > 0.2; discordant: > 0; underpowered: insufficient Clair3 calls

n_clair3_snps_in_region.description: Number of Clair3-called variants inside the candidate region
